text:
is a line of candy toys produced by Shokugan that was released on 20 March 2006. http://www.k3museum.com/goods_html/BANDAI0144.html 

There are 5 unique figures and one variation in this set. pre-painted PVC figure pilot with 7 centimeters in height that can be build by putting the parts together. It is mostly fixed and has a limitated articulation in some parts. It also comes with a dedicated stand. There are color variations like a Red plugsuit for Rei and a White plugsuit for Asuka. As for the Evangelions, they come in the anime colors for both Unit-01 and Unit-02 and a blue color scheme for Unit-00.

Trivia

It was the first time commercial figures of Evangelion Unit-00 Type F and Evangelion Unit-02 Type F were produced.
